Skill Path: Alchemical Crafting

You mastered alchemy, the art of creating potions.

While developing your skills in Crafting you chose to focus specifically on Alchemical Crafting, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{Alchemical Crafting}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft}.
